race_meta.race_name: Encore Educational For Early Years Supplies Handicap Chase (Go North Red Rum Qualifier) (GBB Race)

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model placed alright dai at position 2 (22.0% probability) vs top pick Upfordebate (28.0%). Underestimated winning horse by ~6.0 percentage points.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Upfordebate > Alright Dai, but actual result was Alright Dai > Le Grand Vert. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Alright Dai had well-aligned model/market values (divergence 3.8%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
